title: ChainWitness
description: A peer's signed countersignature over another host's evidence-store head (chp-v0.2.md section 12, proposal 0005): 'at global sequence N, HOST's store digested to ROOT' under the chp-store-head-v1 scheme (sha256 over sorted correlation_id\x00head_hash\n lines). The witness signs only the root — no correlation ids leak. Because chains are append-only, the witnessed history at sequence <= N is committed: a later rewrite recomputes to a different root. The statement's value is that it lives with the WITNESS — the witnessed operator cannot delete it.

sequence.description: The witnessed host's global store sequence at witnessing time.

store_head.description: chp-store-head-v1 digest of the store at `sequence`.

revocation_head.description: OPTIONAL chp-revocation-head-v1 digest of the witnessed host's held revocation set (chp-v0.2.md section 12 Revocation freshness, proposal 0010). Present only when the witnessed head carried one (omit-when-absent) — a pre-0010 statement omits it and is byte-identical. Signed into the header when present.

host_identity.description: Self-signed host-identity attestation (chp-v0.2.md §3). 'anchors' is omitted entirely when empty (§3.1 byte rule).

anchors.description: External trust roots vouching for the witness key. MUST be omitted when empty.
